# LLMS.txt - Site Information for AI Systems
# Autitude - Clínica de Terapia Ocupacional e Integração Sensorial

## SITE INFORMATION
- Name: Autitude
- Type: Pediatric Occupational Therapy Clinic
- Location: Rua Major José dos Santos Moreira, 328, Pindamonhangaba-SP, Brazil
- Coordinates: -22.9309, -45.4607
- Phone: +5512991968683
- Email: contato@autitude.com.br
- Website: https://hautlys.github.io/Autitude
- Professional: Dra. Juliana Mariani - CREFITO 20083-TO
- Certification: North Carolina University USA

## SERVICES OFFERED
1. Terapia Ocupacional (Occupational Therapy)
   - Motor fino e grosso (Fine and gross motor)
   - Coordenação motora (Motor coordination)
   - Autonomia pessoal (Personal autonomy)
   - Atividades de vida diária (Daily living activities)

2. Integração Sensorial (Sensory Integration)
   - Developed by Dr. Jean Ayress
   - 8 sensory systems processing
   - Sala Snoezelen / Sala Sensorial
   - Individualized intervention programs

3. ABA (Análise do Comportamento Aplicada)
   - Applied Behavior Analysis
   - Functional behavior assessment
   - Skill teaching
   - Data analysis

4. Estimulação Precoce (Early Intervention)
   - Ages 0-6 years
   - Development monitoring
   - Parent support

5. Avaliação Comportamental (Behavioral Assessment)
   - Sensory evaluation
   - Motor profile
   - Independence scale

## PAGE STRUCTURE
- / (Home) - Main landing page
- /sobre - About the clinic
- /servicos - Services details
- /equipe - Team/Professional
- /contato - Contact information
- /agendar - Schedule appointment
- /faq - Frequently asked questions
- /privacidade - Privacy policy

## KEY TREATMENTS
- Autism Spectrum Disorder (TEA)
- ADHD (TDAH)
- Sensory processing disorders
- Developmental delays
- Motor coordination issues
- Early intervention

## AREAS SERVED
- Pindamonhangaba-SP and surrounding regions
- Online guidance available for other regions

## BUSINESS HOURS
- Monday to Friday: 8h às 18h

## SEO KEYWORDS
terapia ocupacional, integração sensorial, Pindamonhangaba, desenvolvimento infantil, estimulação precoce,儿科职业治疗,感觉统合, autism, TDAH, ABA, pediatric therapy

## CONTENT TYPE
Educational and healthcare content for parents about child development, sensory processing, and occupational therapy.

## TARGET AUDIENCE
- Parents of children with developmental needs
- Healthcare professionals
- Educators

## LAST UPDATED
2024
